channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Blazers sign coach Chauncey Billups to a multi-year extension
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — Coach Chauncey Billups has signed a multi-year contract extension with the Portland Trail Blazers. The Blazers did not release terms of the deal, announced before the regular-season finale against the Lakers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former LSU receiver Kyren Lacy found dead in Houston one day before grand jury review of his negligent homicide case
item.description: LSU wide receiver Kyren Lacy died in Houston, according to his lawyer, school officials and family members
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Celtics star Jaylen Brown received injections in right knee, coach Joe Mazzulla says
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Boston Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla on Sunday confirmed a report that Jaylen Brown received injections during the week to help his troublesome right knee that’s limited his playing time the past month. It was first reported by ESPN that Brown received pain management injections.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Antetokounmpo and most other top Bucks resting for regular-season finale with Pistons
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo and most of the Milwaukee Bucks’ other top players will sit out Sunday’s regular-season finale with Detroit as both teams already are locked into their respective playoff positions.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tom Brady teases WrestleMania 41 appearance
item.description: Tom Brady, a Las Vegas Raiders' minority owner, talked to Fox News Digital about the possibility of making an appearance at WrestleMania 41 next weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump sits cageside at Miami UFC event in his latest appearance at a sports event
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — President Donald Trump said the standing ovation and cheers he drew when he took his seat at a UFC event in his home state of Florida were signs “we're doing a good job.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Chicago Cubs had a big night against the defending champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: St. Francis softball hurls combined no-hitter, takes down Whitney to claim Livermore Stampede championship
item.description: St. Francis softball beat Whitney on Saturday night in Livermore, finishing a perfect 6-0 run through the Livermore Stampede. Several other Bay Area teams competed at the three-day showcase in the East Bay.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baldwin's pinch-hit single in 9th lifts White Sox over Red Sox 3-2
item.description: Pinch-hitter Brooks Baldwin lined an RBI single off Boston closer Aroldis Chapman with one out in the bottom of the ninth, lifting the Chicago White Sox to a 3-2 win over the Red Sox on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rory McIlroy has masterful start at Augusta and closes in on career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The greatest start in the 91-year history of the Masters wasn't enough for Rory McIlroy. He delivered what looked to be a haymaker late Saturday afternoon, a 6-iron so majestic and pure that he walked 10 yards before he saw it land 6 feet away for eagle on the 15th hole.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gunner Stockton strengthens hold on Georgia starting quarterback job with strong spring practice
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Carson Beck's decision to transfer to Miami opened the door for Gunner Stockton to take over as Georgia's starting quarterback.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Zach Johnson was feeling nostalgic. The former Masters champ shot 66, his best at Augusta National
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Zach Johnson was feeling nostalgic after his third round at the Masters on Saturday. Probably felt a bit like the old days while he was playing it.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Masters marker creates a buzz on social media from golf fans wishing they could take his place
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Michael McDermott became the envy of the golf world — again. For the second time in three years, McDermott served as a non-competing marker at the Masters, this time playing alongside Tim Kim for 18 holes in the third round at Augusta National on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers could have a new NFL team on his radar: report
item.description: With Derek Carr's shoulder injury, the New Orleans Saints now becomes a ripe option for four-time MVP quarterback Aaron Rodgers to go, as he remains a free agent.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Salt Lake Bees celebrate first home game at new Daybreak ballpark
item.description: The Bees will welcome the Reno Aces for a six-game homestand starting April 8, which will include giveaways, music, and activities for the whole family.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Giants 2025 City Connect uniforms draw mixed reactions on social media
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants will debut their new City Connect uniforms Tuesday night when they welcome the Cincinnati Reds to Oracle Park. Ahead of the game, the team gave fans a preview of the uniforms in a post on X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
